tools.name: mdr_compliance_check
tools.description: EU MDR 2017/745 compliance assessment for medical devices. Checks CE marking, Notified Body, Clinical Evaluation, PMS, UDI, QMS, EUDAMED. Returns compliance score.

tools.name: ivdr_check
tools.description: EU IVDR 2017/746 in-vitro diagnostic device compliance. Risk class A-D, Notified Body requirements, transition deadlines.

tools.name: device_classification
tools.description: MDR Annex VIII medical device risk classification. Determines Class I/IIa/IIb/III based on device characteristics.

tools.name: udi_validate
tools.description: Validate UDI (Unique Device Identification) format per MDR Art. 27. Identifies issuing agency (GS1/HIBCC/ICCBBA).

tools.name: drug_interaction
tools.description: Basic drug-drug interaction risk check. Educational tool — not a clinical decision system. Checks known high-risk combinations.

tools.name: icd10_lookup
tools.description: ICD-10 code lookup and search. Covers common codes and chapter overview. Uses ICD-10-GM (German Modification).

tools.name: adverse_event_report
tools.description: Generate pharmacovigilance adverse event report template (MedDRA). Includes EU/DE/US reporting obligations and deadlines.

tools.name: gdpr_health_check
tools.description: GDPR Art.9 health data processing compliance assessment. Returns required legal basis, DPIA requirements, retention periods.

tools.name: hipaa_vs_gdpr
tools.description: HIPAA vs GDPR comparison for healthcare organizations. Side-by-side analysis with dual-compliance tips.

tools.name: clinical_trial_phases
tools.description: Clinical trial phase requirements under EU CTR 536/2014. Phase I-IV details, CTIS requirements, German specifics.

tools.name: gmp_checklist
tools.description: Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) audit checklist per EU EudraLex Vol.4. QMS, personnel, premises, documentation, production, QC.

tools.name: medical_calendar_eu
tools.description: EU healthcare regulatory deadlines. MDR/IVDR transitions, AI Act obligations, NIS2, PSUR deadlines.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "icd10_lookup" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.
